assertions.evidence: Agent explored the codebase and read source files, but did not explicitly read AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, or DEVELOPMENT.md as structured context.
No skill references to read — this is the baseline without the skill.
No complexity classification performed. Agent went directly to implementation.
No execution plan created. Agent analyzed existing code and added tests directly.
Proceeded directly without waiting for approval.
Directly modified files without delegation to sub-agents.
All 85 backend tests and 22 iOS tests passed after implementation.
No structured workflow followed. No cross-review, no harness trace/memory writing, no git commit. Worked ad-hoc.
